nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Langely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Langley or Longley (in Kent, Sussex, Hertfordshire, Norfolk, Somerset, Shrops, Lancashire, Durham, and many other counties), themselves from Old English lang ‘long’ + lēah ‘wood, glade, clearing’.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Langlif (Old Norse Langlíf ‘long’ + ‘life’ or ‘body’).

variants.name: Langlais
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Emile, Marcel, Normand, Albertine, Armand, Cecile, Enoil, Herve, Jacques, Laurent.
French: ethnic name for an Englishman, from Anglais ‘Englishman’, with fused definite article l'. Compare Langley .

History: Daniel Sargent dit Sérien and Langlais from Worcester, MA married Marguerite Lavoie in Rivière-Ouelle, QC, in 1718. Joseph Weber dit Langlais from Boston, MA married Marie-Charlotte Guillet in Cap Saint-Ignace, QC, in 1725.

variants.name: Longley
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire and South Yorkshire): variant of   Langley  . Compare   Longpre   2.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Langely was born in 1183, in Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Geoffrey de Langley, was 33 and his mother, Alianore, was 29. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Mary of Middleton.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Langely est né en 1183, à Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Geoffrey de Langley, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alianore, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Mary of Middleton.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Langely 1183 in Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Geoffrey de Langley 33 und seine Mutter Alianore 29. Er hatte mit Mary of Middleton mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Langely è nato il nel 1183 nel Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Geoffrey de Langley, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Alianore, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Mary of Middleton.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Langely(이)가 1183년 영국 랭카실르 미들레턴 비 워링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Geoffrey de Langley(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alianore(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Mary of Middleton(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Langely nasceu em 1183, em Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Geoffrey de Langley, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alianore, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Mary of Middleton.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Langely родился в 1183 г. в местности миддлетон би варрингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Geoffrey de Langley было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alianore, 29. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Mary of Middleton.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Langely nació en 1183, en Middleton by Warrington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Geoffrey de Langley, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alianore, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Mary of Middleton.
